info.title: Tenbyte Cloud API
info.description: API for managing cloud resources like Virtual Machines, Storage, Networks, and more on tenbytecloud.com.

get.description: Authenticated user can request data-model for themselves.

patch.description: Authenticated user can modify their own profile data.

personal_id_number.description: Personal identity number, usually issued by the state

get.description: List all SSH public keys associated with the authenticated user.

post.description: Create a new SSH public key. The public_key is immutable once created.

name.description: A human-friendly name for the key, unique per user

409.description: Conflict - key with same name already exists

patch.description: Rename an existing SSH key. Only metadata (name) can be changed.

delete.description: Delete an SSH key by UUID.

post.description: Create new token and register it at API Gateway.

get.description: List user API tokens.
Returns list of available locations (data centres). Use the location slug in the URL path after version number to target a specific location: /v1/{slug}/.

delete.description: Delete virtual machine. Location-specific endpoint — optionally prefix path with /{slug}/.

errors.Error: No such virtual machine exists. aaaaaaaa-0000-bbbb-1111-cccccccccccc

get.description: Get virtual machine data. Location-specific endpoint.

patch.description: Currently only name, vcpu and ram can be changed. vcpu and ram can only be changed when the machine is in stopped state. Location-specific endpoint.

post.description: Create a new virtual machine. billing_account_id is optional if using an API token restricted to one billing account. Location-specific endpoint.

designated_pool_uuid.description: Resource pool to allocate this VM into

patch.description: Set a new password for an existing user on the virtual machine. The VM must be running. Location-specific endpoint.

get.description: Get a list of pools available for running compute resources. Location-specific endpoint.

example.description: A server class for a wide range of purposes
example.name: General

post.description: Discard virtual machine's current storage state and overwrite it with an OS base image. Location-specific endpoint.
Toggle automatic backups for virtual machine. Location-specific endpoint.
Clone existing virtual machine. Location-specific endpoint.

delete.description: DEPRECATED — see Floating IP for the updated API. Release a virtual machine's public IPv4 address. Location-specific endpoint.

post.description: DEPRECATED — see Floating IP for the updated API. Reserve and assign a public IP address for a virtual machine. Location-specific endpoint.

get.description: Get virtual machine list. Location-specific endpoint.

post.description: Discard virtual machine's current storage state and restore it from the specified replica. Location-specific endpoint.

delete.description: Delete replica by uuid. Location-specific endpoint.

get.description: Get virtual machine storage replica list. Location-specific endpoint.

post.description: Create replica from block storage. Location-specific endpoint.
Start virtual machine. Location-specific endpoint.
Stop a virtual machine. By default tries a graceful ACPI shutdown. Use force=True to immediately cut power. Location-specific endpoint.

post.summary: Boot a rescue or installation media
post.description: Launches the VM with a live OS image attached as a cd-rom device for booting. Mode is enabled for a single launch only. Location-specific endpoint.
Create and add a disk device of specified capacity to a virtual machine. Location-specific endpoint.

patch.description: Modify virtual machine disk capacity. New disk size cannot be smaller than current size. Location-specific endpoint.

delete.description: Disconnects and completely removes a disk device from a virtual machine. Data will be irrecoverably lost. Primary/boot disks cannot be deleted. Location-specific endpoint.

post.description: Creates a new block storage disk. Can be empty, a copy of an OS base image, an existing disk, or a snapshot. Location-specific endpoint.

billing_account_id.description: Required if using a global API token

source_image_type.description: One of OS_BASE, DISK, SNAPSHOT or EMPTY (default)

source_image.description: Reference to an image to be copied

get.description: List user's disks. Location-specific endpoint.

parameters.name: read_only_bootable
parameters.description: If true, returns only disks marked as read-only bootable

get.description: Get one disk. Location-specific endpoint.

patch.description: Modify meta-data of a disk. Location-specific endpoint.

delete.description: Delete a disk and all its snapshots. All data will be lost irrecoverably. Location-specific endpoint.

post.description: Attaches a disk to a virtual machine. Location-specific endpoint.
Detaches a disk from a virtual machine. Location-specific endpoint.

get.description: Returns S3 API URL.

put.description: Create an S3 object storage bucket. Bucket names must be globally unique across all users.

name.description: Bucket name, must conform to S3 bucket naming rules

billing_account_id.description: Required if using a global API token

delete.description: Delete an S3 object storage bucket. Only empty buckets can be deleted via this API.

get.description: Get bucket information.
List user's buckets. Optionally filter by billing account.

parameters.name: billing_account_id
parameters.description: If specified then only buckets with this billing account are returned

get.description: Get S3 user info, including access and secret keys. User and keys will be generated if they do not exist already.
Returns all user S3 keys.

post.description: Generate a new S3 key pair. Returns the list of all keys.

get.description: Get network data. Location-specific endpoint.

delete.description: Delete network. The network can be deleted if it does not contain any resources and it is not default. Location-specific endpoint.

get.description: List user networks with resources. Location-specific endpoint.

post.description: Creates a new private network with specified descriptive name. If the first network of the user, it is set as default. Location-specific endpoint.

put.description: Change network to default. Other private networks will be changed to non-default. Location-specific endpoint.

post.description: Create new floating IP. Location-specific endpoint.

get.description: List floating IPs. Can be filtered by billing_account_id and vm_uuid. Location-specific endpoint.
Get floating IP. Location-specific endpoint.

200.description: Response body is empty. Response code: 200.

post.description: Assign floating IP. Accepted values of assigned_to_resource_type: virtual_machine, service, load_balancer. Location-specific endpoint.

assigned_to.description: UUID of the resource to assign to

post.description: Un-assign floating IP. Location-specific endpoint.

get.description: Retrieves a list of firewalls for the current user. Location-specific endpoint.

post.description: Creates a new firewall with a given set of rules. See Representation and validation for FirewallRule object structure. Location-specific endpoint.

put.description: Updates an existing firewall configuration. Location-specific endpoint.

parameters.name: firewallUuid
parameters.description: UUID of the firewall to update

rules.description: Array of FirewallRule objects with updated fields

delete.description: Deletes a specified firewall. Location-specific endpoint.

parameters.name: firewallUuid
parameters.description: UUID of the firewall to delete

post.description: Associates a firewall with a specific virtual machine. Location-specific endpoint.

delete.description: Removes the association between a firewall and a virtual machine. Location-specific endpoint.

get.description: Get list of load balancers owned by user. Location-specific endpoint.

post.description: Create new load balancer. Location-specific endpoint.

get.summary: Get user load balancer by UUID
get.description: Get user load balancer by UUID. Location-specific endpoint.

200.description: Response body is empty. Response code: 200.

post.description: Add new target to load balancer. Location-specific endpoint.

delete.description: Unlink target from load balancer. Location-specific endpoint.

200.description: Response body is empty. Response code: 200.

post.description: Add new port forwarding rule to load balancer. Location-specific endpoint.

delete.description: Drop port rule from load balancer. Location-specific endpoint.

200.description: Response body is empty. Response code: 200.

put.summary: Change billing account on load balancer
put.description: Change Billing Account that load balancer is assigned to. Location-specific endpoint.

get.description: Describes VM creation parameters and their expected and allowed values.

example.description: Size of main storage in gigabytes.
OS name of VM base image.
OS version of VM base image.
Password for logging in to the VM.
Username for logging in to the VM.

get.description: Returns list of VM images and corresponding versions for the platform Compute section.
Returns list of plain Virtual Machines images and corresponding versions for the platform Compute section.
Returns list of App Catalog images and corresponding versions for the platform Compute section.
Returns list of available bootable ISO images.

tags.name: User
tags.description: User profile and SSH key management

tags.name: Parameters
tags.description: VM creation parameters and image lists
